message:
🌱 Add Model Pack to ADOPTERS.MD (#10937)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,3 +19,4 @@ Listed below are organizations that have adopted, or benefitted from, KubeStella
 | Chaos Mesh | Guided install mission for Chaos Mesh via KubeStellar Console, with maintainer @STRRL explicitly requesting a new install doc in [chaos-mesh/chaos-mesh#4858](https://github.com/chaos-mesh/chaos-mesh/issues/4858#issuecomment-4240793340) and docs PR [chaos-mesh/website#447](https://github.com/chaos-mesh/website/pull/447) | Incubating | [Chaos Mesh](https://chaos-mesh.org) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-chaos-mesh) |
 | Kairos | Guided install mission for Kairos via KubeStellar Console, with interest from Kairos maintainer @mudler in [kairos-io/kairos#4014](https://github.com/kairos-io/kairos/issues/4014) | Sandbox | [Kairos](https://kairos.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kairos) |
 | Drasi | Guided install mission for Drasi verified end-to-end by a Drasi maintainer, with engagement and fixes tracked in [drasi-project/drasi-platform#400](https://github.com/drasi-project/drasi-platform/issues/400) | Sandbox | [Drasi](https://drasi.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-drasi) |
+| Model Pack | Guided install mission for Model CSI Driver via KubeStellar Console, with engagement tracked in [modelpack/model-csi-driver#30](https://github.com/modelpack/model-csi-driver/issues/30) | N/A | [Model CSI Driver](https://github.com/modelpack/model-csi-driver) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-modelpack-csi-driver) |
